title: Student Under Cherry Blossoms
prompt: High-quality original anime-style key art of a high school student standing under blooming cherry blossom trees. Warm spring afternoon sun filtering through the pink petals, soft petals drifting in the gentle breeze, clean lines, vibrant pastel colors, extremely detailed background, gorgeous aesthetic.

title: Sky Train Journey
prompt: Gorgeous original anime illustration of a bright locomotive train traveling along a track built across fluffy clouds during a breathtaking sunset. Wide sky painted with orange and pink hues, peaceful passengers looking out, soft magical lighting, whimsical atmosphere, highly detailed environment, cinematic composition.

title: Moonlit Garden Mage
prompt: Stunning original anime style artwork of a young mage wearing an elegant dark robe in a moonlit garden. Glowing floating lanterns casting warm golden light, magical blue sparkles drifting around, peaceful facial expression, highly detailed glowing fantasy flowers, enchanting atmosphere, family-friendly.

title: Cozy Cafe Artist

title: Stargazing Friends
